creative_brief: Split frame: left side shows a generic barcode on plastic-wrapped meat, desaturated. Right side shows a sunlit farm gate with a hand-painted sign reading 'Bundarra Farm.' Warm, natural light. FarmThru logo bottom right.
primary_text:
Honest moment: we lost something when food became anonymous.

Not through anyone's fault. Just slowly, over decades. The farm gate got further away. The supply chain got longer. And the people growing your food became invisible.

We wanted to fix that. So we built a grocery store around the opposite idea.

Every product traces back to a named farm. Bundarra for pork. Collins Wild Caught for South Coast seafood. Paris Creek for carbon-neutral dairy. Real people, real land, real practices.

No warehouses. No wholesalers. Farm to hub to you.

This is bigger than groceries. And soon, you can own a piece of it.
headline: Food got anonymous. We're changing that.
description: Named farms, zero middlemen. Collect from Brookvale Mon-Fri, no commitment needed.
